description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 10, 2025 at 8:06 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Santa Monica, California was in a 
collision involving a pickup truck on Broadway at Euclid Court.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwestbound on Broadway when it made a left turn onto Euclid Court. A pickup truck was stopped facing 
southeast on Euclid Court to yield to a vehicle that was stopped facing northwest. After the Waymo AV completed its left turn, the Waymo 
AV came to a stop to yield to the pickup truck and the pickup truck began to reverse. The rear of the pickup truck then made contact with 
the front of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both 
vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
